subject: A massive armored quadruped beast charging through dust and rubble — its body is broad, heavily scaled and ridged, shown from a low-angle wide shot with a tiny hedron fragment visible in the upper right
description: A low-angle wide shot dominated by a large heavily-armored quadruped creature surging forward through a cloud of dust and broken stone. The creature's body is broad and covered in thick ridged scales or armor plating — warm brown, tan, and rust tones. Its head is massive and low-slung, with a blunt snout and visible teeth. The overall body shape suggests a rhino or ankylosaur archetype but distinctly fantastical in its proportions and scale detail. The ground below is obscured by kicked-up dust. In the upper right corner a small angular object — possibly a hedron fragment — is visible against a pale blue sky. The composition emphasizes raw mass and momentum.
foreground: Massive scaled quadruped body charging forward, dust cloud
background: Pale blue sky, dust haze, hedron fragment
